creator: lightside@safebox.ru
text:
Hello.

I prepared needed changes for new version (Justice Edition) of Sauerbraten port, which I included with this problem report, to update main games/sauerbraten port.

Alternatively, patch and/or all files can be downloaded from following links:
- patch (14 Kb in archive):
http://ul.to/6ujaby
- files (28.96 Kb in archive):
http://ul.to/o4dwid

What can be added:
- New (optional) RPG client. But new separate makefile invocation needed (e.g. work/sauerbraten/src/rpggame/Makefile).

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
